fms.policy.policyoption.CfnAbout: Contains the AWS Network Firewall firewall policy options to configure the policy's deployment model and third-party firewall policy settings.

fms.policy.policyoption.NetworkFirewallP.Description: Defines the deployment model to use for the firewall policy.

fms.policy.policyoption.ThirdPartyFirewa.Description: Defines the policy options for a third-party firewall policy.
